Patch Set 4:

please note that this patch is not being landed because it has an unmet dependency.
Either remove the dependency if it's not needed (or at least indicate so somewhere) or make the dependency landable too.

Patch Set 4:

Oleg, this mod is not truly dependent on http://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/16177. it  is in a chain only because both this mod and http://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/16177 are true dependencies of http://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/15825, the pending mod for sles12.

I strongly recommend that this be landed now in spite of http://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/16777 having -test results.

Patch Set 4:

typo in the last comment.  It should say:

I strongly recommend that this be landed now in spite of http://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/16177 having -test results.

parents.subject: LU-1095 mdc: remove console spew from mdc_ioc_fid2path

commit.subject: LU-7098 osd-ldiskfs: don't alloc inode directly
commit.message:
LU-7098 osd-ldiskfs: don't alloc inode directly

We should alloc ldiskfs_inode_info instead alloc inode
directly. Else will overflow in follow ldiskfs_add_entry.

Signed-off-by: Yang Sheng <yang.sheng@intel.com>
Change-Id: Ib88f847ea8f160f6f0d0c7e7e680247d7ec96fb6
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/16804
Reviewed-by: Fan Yong <fan.yong@intel.com>
Tested-by: Jenkins
Reviewed-by: Alex Zhuravlev <alexey.zhuravlev@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Frank Zago <fzago@cray.com>
Reviewed-by: Bob Glossman <bob.glossman@intel.com>
